name: JC Hernandez
subject: A strike for taxpayers
body:
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter,

Keep your eye on the ball, because government officials want to tax you for it.
The proposed Potomac Nationals stadium could cost between $60-$100 million. As nice as a new stadium sounds, politicians and teams expect YOU to pay for it!

[ ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=b025cf61b64af329adf422d70a7f7e2e587d019480219857e17ef3389cae92bb4d2a1bfbd63780b257e3791a6ccdd5d45464349268e7a3d7)
Corporate welfare is an expensive strikeout for taxpayers; just ask New Jersey or Connecticut residents who paid _millions_ for baseball stadiums that stand [vacant.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=b025cf61b64af329afbbf7333f3cee70789d7af8ceef6d410eeca27835af9e2e988312cb732ca3e2e517b3458f11495623b1b7575bf72469 "vacant.")
Don't let Virginia be next! [Tell your local officials not to subsidize stadiums.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=b025cf61b64af329b37ce75bca5ab9f661bc29a5d18da17481702268acc36d9c75f64a9f08b7ec715160dbca595a4e7d340a342c4c1139c6 "Tell your local officials not to subsidize stadiums.")
For Freedom,

JC Hernandez Deputy State Director Americans for Prosperity - Virginia

name: Tom Perez
subject: The next health care fight is coming soon. Add your name if you're ready to win.
body:
Republicans are back with a new health care "plan."
---
**Add your name to stand with Democrats and say you'll fight to protect our health care:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Health-Care1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170405_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170405_tp_v2s1")**
Friend --

On Monday, the White House started another round of rushed negotiations to revive their disastrous health "care" bill. A room filled with a diverse set of minds, ranging from the most extreme Republicans to slightly less extreme Republicans, conjured up an agreement on a new bill that would effectively eliminate protections for people with pre-existing conditions.

Donald Trump promised that he would not allow insurers to refuse to cover people with pre-existing conditions or make them pay more for coverage. Consider this another broken Trump promise.

I don't know why Trump and the GOP just don't get it. In this country, we protect the sick and provide for the most vulnerable. But this Republican plan would cost them dearly -- potentially even cost them their lives.

**Republicans' second attempt at a health care bill is no better than the first. Let's finally put an end to this absurdity. Add your name to say you'll protect affordable health care for all Americans:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Health-Care1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170405_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170405_tp_v2s1")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cae5/4067b0a/2ef2fa73a/7e730aca/4270250847/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170405_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170405_tp_v2s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cae5/4067b0a/2ef2fa73a/7e730acb/4270250847/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170405_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170405_tp_v2s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cae5/4067b0a/2ef2fa73a/7e730ac8/4270250847/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170405_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170405_tp_v2s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cae5/4067b0a/2ef2fa73a/7e730ac9/4270250847/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170405_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170405_tp_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 4/05/2017. |

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
Today, President Donald J. Trump will welcome King Abdullah II and Queen Rania of Jordan to the White House. Since the earliest days of the campaign against ISIS, Jordan has been a staunch ally and partner. Working together, the United States and Jordan can help bring peace and stability to the Middle East and to people around the world.

**MORNING:**
* **11:55AM** : President Trump and the First Lady welcome King Abdullah II and Queen Rania of Jordan

**AFTERNOON:**
* **12:10PM** : President Trump meets with King Abdullah II
* **12:30PM** : President Trump leads an expanded bilateral meeting with King Abdullah II
* **1:10PM** : President Trump and King Abdullah II hold a joint press conference – **[Watch LIVE](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8813802e09d014bc5c2f788715ef5a135cf3fef327c856a35efdb7b32e750be411b51d21ba5fbf4bfbec5e7ece0dc5852578d9ec83638c4b)**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Judge Gorsuch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

I have spent a lot of time weighing the Supreme Court nomination of Judge Gorsuch. I met with him, read dozens of his opinions, and spoke to legal experts and lawyers who have appeared before his court. And I have heard from thousands of my constituents. Based on this homework, I have decided to vote no on the nomination.

What stands out about Judge Gorsuch's history of rulings is his repeatedly activist approach to cases involving a woman's right to make her own decisions about her health.

Judge Gorsuch has taken extraordinary steps to force reconsideration of rulings that safeguard access to reproductive health care. He has argued that employers have a right to prevent their company's female employees from using _their own_ health insurance to buy contraception. And he has even referred to women making their own choices about contraception as "the wrongdoing of others."

**Derek, these rulings and statements do not demonstrate the type of judicial philosophy we need on the nation 's highest court. [Will you stand with me and call on the Senate to vote no on Judge Gorsuch?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=qG4jSYwgBl8AePWwU27rgbtdEBZWkgqP)**

Many of Judge Gorsuch's other decisions have been equally troubling. He has ruled against workers' rights, disabled students, and so many other Americans who were only seeking fair treatment under the law.

**My first consideration is how Judge Gorsuch 's rulings would affect Virginians, and I am troubled by what I have seen in his record.** I am opposing Judge Gorsuch for the Supreme Court, and I'd like to know you have my back, Derek. **[Will you add your name to call on the Senate to vote no on Judge Gorsuch?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8Klf2nASAph%2FI%2BubKvBaZrtdEBZWkgqP)**

Thanks,
Tim

disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017fxkblebCyyL7ywJoxUJNDFwMjlb31gCuSPyCd7MTqGlWXmz9ylJ-dS22RmnzVsZqH8FXQl3mx25NOZlfw74vjKmJXa5pfAn8JzBuPisTlXkYQAKS-v9IJZBJGAzzysOnRUB1oqJyEaQqphy8GSadMXGhE8np7xJBTQbtmuN-qmzoN-3rd5RCy60QYanA-ndAAEpm0sHCOBkttqmbVLZMHZUgmxDhy17-FKSSWhodvXybKqK609lUM0VEO9xQ-AF1-TTIlj_nMk=&c=AikiKGMAgGCpvRWyfr4JqpfWWFQiJMQJfHTFS1egk5UN2BWSz3UVNQ==&ch=ClNYofrYIADwAtsYg9w6OhMzZULLep4vUNYdpQgYp4iG9Ez9r7AGbA==)
---
| | |
---
| Dear PeterToday, Virginia's General Assembly reconvened for our veto session, in which the Senate and House each meet to accept or reject the Governor's proposed modifications to bills and attempting to override his vetoes, where necessary.This year [Governor McAuliffe set a new veto record.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017fxkblebCyyL7ywJoxUJNDFwMjlb31gCuSPyCd7MTqGlWXmz9ylJ-QUrKbnbCKGtWQOdcABlWMNvLGXZNdqcavs8z-5hP_6zGEaHkyTn22YcoYZ_stappd3m71Y3JFeHSCnY9hTpowQaiOvr5-d3EA51YNhgg4V6pBF3awNEscalCF7kwaeBKSXIfy-HZWRDPXj4nxCkic2TxqFdtjzsy2y4M4nPxUWXYSljZH_eleu8CrbqGbO_7WZHqRf_ugHyBWpu6CjhCMJJF5UBSsUUDdOvx3BCc--CvLUZS-2w0p-C25YTa3AcYjiykOxSv_XQRnY6EYQ97Xv50qJovQrNguNkiT45xwJQ9r7Sl-qsdFmyAgnHNIr07iESfuFvcsUF&c=AikiKGMAgGCpvRWyfr4JqpfWWFQiJMQJfHTFS1egk5UN2BWSz3UVNQ==&ch=ClNYofrYIADwAtsYg9w6OhMzZULLep4vUNYdpQgYp4iG9Ez9r7AGbA==) He vetoed several of my bills and sent back amendments on others that unfortunately gutted the bills. The vetoes of my bills included the veto of a bill to protect law-abiding crime victims against domestic abusers, stalkers, and sexual predators, the veto of a bill allowing for access to gun training programs, and the veto of a bill allowing active duty military servicemembers to carry concealed without a permit..
[The first bill](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017fxkblebCyyL7ywJoxUJNDFwMjlb31gCuSPyCd7MTqGlWXmz9ylJ-Z_wby8fpBLxGHmjrFns4qc7eTkugrGW9v2G6X4hci4FgUEcweLGBWYyXkcbzTYXuqnQQ2DusSlSKsVcmJfeBq0o0ahENYqgKHa1JnFKuF9wTJiL23laF8t0oI87vkPSdIw-jWyR8wn5eZKJ7TUufEHmiIsDs8QIBD6yKDyA9rtEmJ7CgBcwQpQ=&c=AikiKGMAgGCpvRWyfr4JqpfWWFQiJMQJfHTFS1egk5UN2BWSz3UVNQ==&ch=ClNYofrYIADwAtsYg9w6OhMzZULLep4vUNYdpQgYp4iG9Ez9r7AGbA==) passed with bipartisan support. It allowed law-abiding victims of domestic violence, stalking, and sexual abuse to carry concealed weapons on an emergency basis so they are not left defenseless while waiting carry permit paperwork. Many other states have passed similar emergency provisions and victims' lives have been protected.
[The second bill](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017fxkblebCyyL7ywJoxUJNDFwMjlb31gCuSPyCd7MTqGlWXmz9ylJ-RJ5W8_h5SzyyCC9qqgxc-lABOymtLsAxxJdMJW5wuidNyW1zufJjbHji1rlmSty6fc4_4LPVpG9CT1GylwyJR9hSR68CbxucOb4VIR6cJOKkgqGYNS-PnT2srSXhTDkrlH5RBc_043Qq9nrAIO3tjLvp67ozN-8pVXNktHeim2qowoTaxj22iM=&c=AikiKGMAgGCpvRWyfr4JqpfWWFQiJMQJfHTFS1egk5UN2BWSz3UVNQ==&ch=ClNYofrYIADwAtsYg9w6OhMzZULLep4vUNYdpQgYp4iG9Ez9r7AGbA==) also passed with bipartisan support. It allowed victims' services funds to be used to provide gun safety training to victims of crime. All too often, the horrors of abuse result in first-time purchases by new gun owners who may not have the same level of gun safety training as those who grew up with firearms.
The third veto is a bill that I introduced with my colleague Dick Black which allows active duty military servicemembers to carry concealed without a permit. It seems to me that a soldier who has been trained and vetted by our military, and who is qualified to handle military weapons ranging from machine guns to tanks should be trusted to concealed carry without first filling out Virginia state paperwork.The Governor disagreed and vetoed the bill, [saying, and I quote](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017fxkblebCyyL7ywJoxUJNDFwMjlb31gCuSPyCd7MTqGlWXmz9ylJ-QUrKbnbCKGtwfslIpd-S460AvRJhDlvhymK4r8gafncYO2pbQmMusIq2wb6EVDkArsb0VNtwwN810udznrfyvq8wNrC-heIubpBUaPIFbhYOhd9FTSTXdv9US4Z9T8CYJ_PjaOc4zOB6StNfT-3I4Ch9JWCXACdLA==&c=AikiKGMAgGCpvRWyfr4JqpfWWFQiJMQJfHTFS1egk5UN2BWSz3UVNQ==&ch=ClNYofrYIADwAtsYg9w6OhMzZULLep4vUNYdpQgYp4iG9Ez9r7AGbA==):"All of us are grateful to the brave young men and women who serve the Commonwealth and the Nation in uniform. However, that service does not automatically qualify them for the responsibilities involved in carrying a concealed handgun, any more than it automatically qualifies them for a driver's license." - Governor Terry McAuliffe
That's a disappointing view of our servicemen and women and unfortunately we did not have the necessary 2/3 votes in the Senate to override the Governor's vetoes on any of these vetoes. These bills are now dead. Finally, the Governor sent back changes to two of my bills that I asked the Senate to reject and we had the necessary votes to reject those changes.One was a bill to create a uniform voter registration deadline which I introduced at the request of our registrars to make the process easier for voters.The second was a bill to protect citizens in the Commonwealth from repeated meals tax referenda and require transparency in the ballot language. The Senate also rejected the Governor's changes that would have gutted the bill.I am very grateful for the overwhelming support from people around Virginia for so many of the bills that we worked on this session. In particular, I am grateful for those who worked to advocate for the bills we tried to save today.If you believe in our work, [please join our team](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017fxkblebCyyL7ywJoxUJNDFwMjlb31gCuSPyCd7MTqGlWXmz9ylJ-f0M6IP85Z163GXjyi2eS2lwqz-judmaIongOCv6Aq9PBTVaIEDvKTuzPP3tpQ-gTgHBJwQn_xueaEij9yHF9gis0irwGcEHi-8fduP-2UJqx_zBgB99OqXQquuBpOetsA==&c=AikiKGMAgGCpvRWyfr4JqpfWWFQiJMQJfHTFS1egk5UN2BWSz3UVNQ==&ch=ClNYofrYIADwAtsYg9w6OhMzZULLep4vUNYdpQgYp4iG9Ez9r7AGbA==). I look forward to working with you on the campaign trail in 2017 as we work hard on our lieutenant governor's race!
---
| Sincerely,
---
| | |
---|---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | == | | | | Dear PeterToday, Virginia's General Assembly reconvened for our veto session, in which the Senate and House each meet to accept or reject the Governor's proposed modifications to bills and attempting to override his vetoes, where necessary.This year == He vetoed several of my bills and sent back amendments on others that unfortunately gutted the bills. The vetoes of my bills included the veto of a bill to protect law-abiding crime victims against domestic abusers, stalkers, and sexual predators, the veto of a bill allowing for access to gun training programs, and the veto of a bill allowing active duty military servicemembers to carry concealed without a permit.. == passed with bipartisan support. It allowed law-abiding victims of domestic violence, stalking, and sexual abuse to carry concealed weapons on an emergency basis so they are not left defenseless while waiting carry permit paperwork. Many other states have passed similar emergency provisions and victims' lives have been protected. == also passed with bipartisan support. It allowed victims' services funds to be used to provide gun safety training to victims of crime. All too often, the horrors of abuse result in first-time purchases by new gun owners who may not have the same level of gun safety training as those who grew up with firearms. The third veto is a bill that I introduced with my colleague Dick Black which allows active duty military servicemembers to carry concealed without a permit. It seems to me that a soldier who has been trained and vetted by our military, and who is qualified to handle military weapons ranging from machine guns to tanks should be trusted to concealed carry without first filling out Virginia state paperwork.The Governor disagreed and vetoed the bill, ==:"All of us are grateful to the brave young men and women who serve the Commonwealth and the Nation in uniform. However, that service does not automatically qualify them for the responsibilities involved in carrying a concealed handgun, any more than it automatically qualifies them for a driver's license." - Governor Terry McAuliffe That's a disappointing view of our servicemen and women and unfortunately we did not have the necessary 2/3 votes in the Senate to override the Governor's vetoes on any of these vetoes. These bills are now dead. Finally, the Governor sent back changes to two of my bills that I asked the Senate to reject and we had the necessary votes to reject those changes.One was a bill to create a uniform voter registration deadline which I introduced at the request of our registrars to make the process easier for voters.The second was a bill to protect citizens in the Commonwealth from repeated meals tax referenda and require transparency in the ballot language. The Senate also rejected the Governor's changes that would have gutted the bill.I am very grateful for the overwhelming support from people around Virginia for so many of the bills that we worked on this session. In particular, I am grateful for those who worked to advocate for the bills we tried to save today.If you believe in our work, ==. I look forward to working with you on the campaign trail in 2017 as we work hard on our lieutenant governor's race! | Sincerely, | | | ---|--- | | Jill Vogel P. S. If you believe crime victims deserve better, == and help us bring about new leadership in Richmond which puts victims first and defends the rights of law-abiding Virginians. | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates == == | | | Vogel for Virginia | 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@vogelforvirginia.com in collaboration with |

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Supreme Court update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Thank you for standing with me last week ahead of my first Senate FEC filing deadline. With your support, I am working to make sure our Senate Democratic candidates are prepared for what Republicans and their right wing SuperPACS will be throwing at them in the weeks and months ahead.

Senate Democrats are the last, best line of defense against the extreme and reckless Trump/GOP agenda. And we will work tirelessly to hold that line every day.

This week the fight is on the Senate floor where we face a critical moment -- the efforts of the Republican leadership to ram through Neil Gorsuch's Supreme Court appointment.

After careful consideration I concluded that putting Judge Gorsuch on the Supreme Court would not advance our nation's promise of equal rights, equal justice and equal opportunity. Neil Gorsuch has a long-standing history of consistently putting powerful special interests above the rights of individuals, workers, and consumers.

We need a nominee who will stand up for American families, for workers, and for people with disabilities. And stand up to big corporations. That nominee is not Judge Gorsuch.

[**Add your name to show your opposition to Judge Gorsuch 's Supreme Court nomination >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b1b/70cdc2ba/4757a15c/397fb75/2069798290/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-add-your-name-to-say-no-to-gorsuch?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+to+show+your+opposition+to&utm_campaign=em040417&source=em040417")

We may not win every battle in the weeks and months ahead, but we will fight every fight. And we will turn the tide back and protect our common values.

Thank you for staying engaged. We need you.

Chris

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: 2 Senate votes decided by Pence >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e32/24c69fd9/f01922ca/18e37126/1593620087/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE404N_digital_email_20170405_PP_inact&source=WQEFE404N_digital_email_20170405_PP_inact")
---

Peter,

One. More. Vote.

That's how close the Senate got to stopping Republicans' latest attack on choice last week. On a split vote to allow states to block federal funding to health care clinics that perform abortions, Senator Mitch McConnell had to bring Vice President Mike Pence in to break the tie. The final count was 51-50.

Moments like this are why electing pro-choice Democratic women is so important. When protecting or destroying choice comes down to the margins, we need to elect women at all levels of government who will always fight for what's right -- and change the outcomes.

**[Donate $3 today to elect women who will always make the difference.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e32/24c69fd9/f01922ca/18e37127/1593620087/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170405_email_PP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+today+to+elect+women+who+will+a&utm_campaign=WQEFE404N_digital_email_20170405_PP_inact&source=WQEFE404N_digital_email_20170405_PP_inact")**

This isn't the first time Vice President Pence has been a tiebreaker. He also broke the Senate deadlock on the nomination of Education Secretary Betsy DeVos, marking the first time in history that a vice president has been called to break a tie on a cabinet nomination.

Enough with these close votes in the Senate -- let's start winning them.

It starts with making sure Democrats don't lose an inch. And with **NINE** of our women in the Senate up for re-election next year, that won't be easy. We also need to try and flip at least one seat, and our best bet is Nevada -- which went blue last year.

That's a tall order, but failure isn't an option if we want a Congress that will protect choice.

**EMILY's List women are a firewall in the Senate right now. Donate $3 to protect and grow their ranks:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Make-the-Difference](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e32/24c69fd9/f01922ca/18e37120/1593620087/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170405_email_PP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgMaketheDifferenc&utm_campaign=WQEFE404N_digital_email_20170405_PP_inact&source=WQEFE404N_digital_email_20170405_PP_inact")**

Thanks for all you do,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

name: JUST IN (via DSCC)
subject: Sen. Jeff Merkley held the floor all night long (Supreme Court)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
This morning, Senator Jeff Merkley ended a marathon protest speech against Trump's Supreme Court nominee, Neil Gorsuch. And the entire nation took notice...
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e161/2b07114c/5e7e2f5f/736cd446/2912276556/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-senator-merkley?source=DPE-20170405-JustInDS-ProsHV")
Team,

Last night, Senator Jeff Merkley went to the floor to protest Trump's Supreme Court nominee, Neil Gorsuch.

Ten hours in -- he made clear why: _" I'm here on the floor at 4:20 in the morning because so much is at stake in terms of the legitimacy of the court."_

Merkley named reason after reason to oppose Gorsuch, INCLUDING the fact that the President who nominated him is under investigation by the FBI. And he didn't stop until this morning, **more than 15 and a half hours later.**

He fought for as long as he was able, friend -- calling out Republicans for their disregard for Senate rules, partisan warfare, and Gorsuch's extreme record.

[**Will you join us in thanking Senator Merkley for speaking out? Sign the card >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e161/2b07114c/5e7e2f5f/736cd446/2912276556/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-senator-merkley?source=DPE-20170405-JustInDS-ProsHV")

Senator Merkley's marathon speech ranks among the longest Senate floor protests documented since 1900. His commitment just escalated the Supreme Court fight to a new level.

Now, the entire nation is taking notice of the opposition mounting against Gorsuch.

To thank Senator Merkley, we want to show how many grassroots democrats appreciate his dedication. **Will you join us and sign the card to show you 're standing with him?**

[**https://dscc.org/thank-jeff**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e161/2b07114c/5e7e2f5f/736cd446/2912276556/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-senator-merkley?source=DPE-20170405-JustInDS-ProsHV")

Thank you,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on contributions, friend:**

Donald Trump and the GOP have announced six-figure ad buys against Democratic Senators who are standing up to his Supreme Court nominee. With 99% of our donations coming from grassroots democrats giving $200 or less, we really mean it when we say we're counting on your support.

Please consider making a contribution of any amount today. We need your help in this fight.
